SL_Inventory_Conversion.description: UOM conversion for order UOM / operative quantity. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Inventory_Conversion.impactIfOmitted: UOM conversion not auto-calculated in UI; backend handles on save.

SL_Inventory_Product.description: Auto-fill UOM and storage bin from product. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Inventory_Product.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set UOM and locator after selecting product.

SL_Inventory_Locator.description: Locator-related callout triggered on attribute set / locator. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Inventory_Locator.impactIfOmitted: No auto-fill on locator change; acceptable for simplified UI.

AD_Org show child organizations.description: Filters organization selector to child organizations in the hierarchy.
AD_Org show child organizations.impactIfOmitted: Users could select organizations outside their accessible tree.

M_Locator of Warehouse.description: Filters storage bin selector to bins belonging to the header warehouse (M_Locator.M_Warehouse_ID = @M_Warehouse_ID@).
M_Locator of Warehouse.impactIfOmitted: Users could select storage bins from wrong warehouses.

READONLY_Processed_Header.description: Header fields (warehouse, movementDate, description) become read-only when document is processed (Processed=Y).
READONLY_Processed_Header.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit fields on confirmed inventory counts, breaking data integrity.

READONLY_Processed_Lines.description: Line fields (product, locator, lineNo, countQuantity) become read-only when document is processed.
READONLY_Processed_Lines.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit lines on confirmed inventory counts.

PROCESS_ProcessInventoryCount.description: Process Inventory Count classic button (Processing). Confirms and posts the inventory count.
PROCESS_ProcessInventoryCount.impactIfOmitted: Users cannot confirm inventory counts from the UI.

PROCESS_CreateInventoryCountList.description: Create Inventory Count List classic button (GenerateList). Generates count lines from stock — not applicable.
PROCESS_CreateInventoryCountList.impactIfOmitted: Lines added manually or through a separate flow.

PROCESS_UpdateQuantity.description: Update Quantity classic button. Not applicable to simplified UI.

PROCESS_Posted.description: Posted hardcoded button. Not applicable to simplified UI.
